fields.title: Inception
fields.description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into a target's mind.

fields.title: The Dark Knight
fields.description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests.

fields.title: Interstellar
fields.description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

fields.title: Parasite
fields.description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

fields.title: The Shawshank Redemption
fields.description: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

fields.title: The Matrix
fields.description: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

fields.title: Breaking Bad
fields.description: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with inoperable lung cancer turns to manufacturing and selling methamphetamine.

fields.title: Stranger Things
fields.description: When a young boy disappears, his mother must confront terrifying forces in order to get him back.

fields.title: Avatar: Fire & Ash
fields.description: Jake Sully and his family face a new threat as the RDA returns to Pandora with devastating new weapons.

fields.title: Mission: Impossible 8
fields.description: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team face their most dangerous mission yet.

fields.title: Dune: Messiah
fields.description: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen to rule Arrakis, but the consequences of his rise to power are more devastating than he could have imagined.
